case_title: BRENNAN, MICHAEL et al VS AVILA, SUZANNE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,750.00 FILED BY BRENNAN, MICHAEL BRENNAN, KERRI AS TO DEFENDANT AVILA, SUZANNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRENNAN, MICHAEL BRENNAN, KERRI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AVILA, SUZANNE JUDGM. FOR DEFEND. & AGAINST PLTFF FOR $1750. SEC DEP. MAY BE HELD BY DEFD, PLTFFS OWE NOTHING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT. RECEIPT TO SUZANNE AVILA RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRENNAN, MICHAEL BRENNAN, KERRI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AVILA, SUZANNE $1,691.67 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,711.67 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT AVILA, SUZANNE
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-08-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-18-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23182, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
